geographic_restrictions: Urban centers of Rhode Island (RI), with priority given to areas with higher populations of children of color.
project_area: Holistic youth development for children of African descent, including well-being, mental health support, educational advancement, leadership opportunities, art exposure, summer camperships, music training, and basic needs expenses.
demographic_requirements: Children of African descent, up to age 18, living in urban centers of RI. Leadership of funded organizations should reflect the diversity of the communities they serve.
eligibility_summary: Organizations must provide cultural, educational, and social opportunities for children of African descent in RI. Preference is given to programs serving larger numbers of children. Funding is for services, not equipment or capital improvements. Applications must be submitted online via the Rhode Island Foundation’s platform.
